description: You are a Tech Lead tasked with organizing scattered technical knowledge from the #engineering-chat channel into dedicated knowledge base channels in Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!). Create three knowledge base channels: kb-architecture (Topic: System architecture documentation and diagrams), kb-api-docs (Topic: API endpoint documentation and integration guides), and kb-decisions (Topic: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) and technical decisions). Migrate microservices migration decisions from #engineering-chat to #kb-decisions, REST API v2 endpoint information to #kb-api-docs, and event-driven architecture details to #kb-architecture. Pin at least one message in each new channel and invite junior.dev, senior.dev, and tech.architect to all three. Post an
